item.description:
What's New

  • add macOS-26.6-25G5028f by @starhaven-bot[bot]

Fixes

  • remove unused macOSdbKit import from SDKDetailView
  • sync sidecar mtime to source archive
  • DMG mount-leak and release-loading robustness
  • view-layer accessibility and error-state polish
  • hardening pass from a fresh review (scanner, CI, app, site, docs)
  • review polish (build-number ordering, chip fallback, shared CLI helpers)

Testing

  • cover parse/validate and end-to-end behavior
